data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): 'link type not found' test must assert: (1) bridge_alert written with available type names listed, (2) set_relationship NOT called, (3) processing continues for other events. Mock get_issue_link_types() to return [{'id': '10000', 'name': 'Blocks'}, {'id': '10001', 'name': 'Cloners'}] (no 'Relates').
